patch_description: Introduce a lightweight simulated annealing refinement inside the main packing construction to escape local optima and boost the total sum of radii. The SA operates on both centers and radii by perturbing a small subset of centers, recomputing feasible radii, and accepting improvements (or near-improvements) with a temperature-guided probability. This complements the existing multi-start initializations and the local optimizer, aiming to push the sum of radii beyond prior bests (target > 2.635). The refinement is implemented as a nested function inside construct_packing to avoid altering the module-level API and to keep changes localized and reproducible.
